findings.title: Upstream boundary OR-guard largely redundant and under-covered by negative tests
findings.evidence: Claude noted the CP00-085 assembler OR-guard checks many CP00-084 upstream invariants before calling the upstream result validator, while only the decision drift branch was directly tested before adjudication.
findings.recommended_action: Add one or two targeted negative tests for upstream runtime flag and taxonomy-bound drift.

findings.title: completed_source_micro_phase_ids is a rolling window, not the full P07 completion set
findings.evidence: Claude observed the CP00-085 result records completed_source_micro_phase_ids as RP00.P07.M03, RP00.P07.M04, and RP00.P07.M05, omitting earlier completed M01/M02 per the established CP00-08x convention.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm sliding-window semantics are intentional for downstream readers.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-085 cleanly consumes CP00-084 and binds RP00.P07.M05.S11-S20 as metadata-only recovery evidence contracts. No P0/P1/P2 findings; one P3 test coverage item fixed and one P3 convention note accepted before closeout.
